title: AgeDefy Clinician Decision (v1)
description: Signed decision returned by a licensed clinician after reviewing a clinician-handoff packet. Referenced by agents/clinician-review-agent.yml (return_payload.schema_ref). A decision is only attributable and auditable if it carries the reviewer's DID and a verifiable signature, so both are required alongside the decision itself.

clinician_did.description: Decentralized identifier of the reviewing clinician.

clinician_signature_vc.description: Verifiable credential cryptographically signing this decision.

modifications.description: Concrete changes to the recommendation. Required when decision == 'modify'.
